hero.name: Mokshada Nehete
hero.subtitle: B.Tech CSE (Honors in AI) @ IIIT Pune  ·  B.S. Data Science @ IIT Madras

paragraphs: I'm a driven computer science student pursuing dual degrees — a B.Tech in CSE with Honors in AI from IIIT Pune and a B.S. in Data Science from IIT Madras — with exceptional academic performance across both institutions.

My passion lies at the intersection of machine learning, generative AI, and full-stack engineering. I love building intelligent systems that are practical and impactful — from multi-agent data pipelines to RAG-powered assistants and computer vision models.

Outside academics, I lead robotics workshops as Club Head of R.O.F.I.E.S, design content for the Mathematics Club, and volunteer with the Robin Hood Army for food and education drives. I believe great engineers also make great humans.

education.institution: Indian Institute of Information Technology (IIIT) Pune  ·  Honors in AI

education.degree: B.S. in Data Science and Applications

projects.label: In Progress
projects.title: AI-Powered Offline Disk Analyzer
projects.description: A fully offline intelligent system for semantic search, OCR, file clustering, and face/object lookup — no internet required.
bullets: Automated file organization and duplicate detection pipeline
Real-time disk monitoring and alerting system
Multi-tab Streamlit UI with local face recognition and object lookup

projects.label: Multi-Agent · Aug 2025
projects.title: Data Analyst Agent
projects.description: End-to-end multi-agent pipeline that automatically sources, cleans, analyzes, and visualizes datasets.
bullets: Ingests from CSV, APIs, S3, HTML, and databases automatically
REST API returning insights and charts within 3 minutes for datasets up to 1TB

projects.label: RAG / LLM · Jun 2025
projects.title: Virtual TA Assistant
projects.description: API-based LLM-powered assistant for IIT Madras course query resolution, deployed as a production service.
bullets: RAG pipeline using FAISS for efficient vector storage and retrieval
all-MiniLM-L6-v2 embeddings for high-quality semantic search
Handles complex course Q&A with accurate, context-aware answers

projects.label: Computer Vision
projects.title: Age & Gender Prediction
projects.description: Deep learning model predicting age (regression) and gender (classification) simultaneously from facial images.
bullets: Pretrained Vision Transformer backbone with custom multi-head outputs
Augmentation strategies for stronger generalization on unseen faces
Single model for dual task — regression and classification

projects.label: Time Series · Kaggle
projects.title: Cinema Audience Forecasting
projects.description: Kaggle competition — forecasting daily cinema audience counts from historical booking and attendance data.
bullets: EDA to identify trend and seasonality patterns
Feature engineering: lag features, rolling windows, calendar signals
Regression-based ML models evaluated with robust cross-validation

projects.label: Full Stack · Dec 2024
projects.title: Household Services Platform
projects.description: Full-stack web platform managing household services across three distinct user roles.
bullets: Dashboards, booking, feedback, and task handling workflows
V1: Flask backend with core service management
V2: Vue.js frontend with REST APIs and analytics dashboard

activities.title: R.O.F.I.E.S — Robotics Club
activities.description: Leading robotics activities, technical workshops, and mentoring teams for competitions. Managing cross-functional projects and training sessions.

activities.title: QuantNum — Mathematics Club
activities.description: Creating research posters, event designs, and interactive math content to make mathematics accessible and engaging.

activities.title: Robin Hood Army
activities.description: Contributing to education, health, and food donation drives for underprivileged children across the community.

activities.title: Throwball & Basketball
activities.description: Runner-up in Zonal Throwball championship; active basketball player competing at the zonal level.
